creator: anders@fix.no
text:
Nessus is a security scanner that looks for vulnerabilities in a given
 network. The GNATS report ports/7921 that was submitted september last year
 was closed without the port appearing at all, so I figured a new port was in
 place.

How-To-Repeat:  
 Use the shar below, or get it from:
 
 http://anders.fix.no/freebsd/ports/archives/nessus.sh
